name: Skim Off the Payout
text:
Whenever an opponent wins a coin flip, wins a die roll, or would create one or more Treasure tokens, you create a Treasure token too. The carnival pays out; the syndicate takes its cut on the way to the window.
Whenever you create a Treasure this way, you may create a Favor token instead. House money is the best money.
flavorText: Every jackpot in Whateverville rings two bells: one for the winner, one in the back room.
